subject: A small cat-like creature erupting through a glowing burst, mouth open in a roar or snarl, framed by two large foreground hands
description: A small feline creature with pointed ears, visible whiskers, and an open snarling mouth launches upward through an intense golden-orange glow or burst of energy. The creature's body is lit from below and behind by warm fire-toned light, giving it a blazing halo effect. In the extreme foreground, two large human hands — one on each side — frame the scene, as though the cat burst free from a grip or enclosure. The palette is dominated by amber, gold, and orange tones. The overall impression is of violent, explosive energy concentrated in a small body. No weapons or armor are visible on the creature itself.
foreground: two large hands flanking a leaping cat-creature mid-burst
emotion: explosive fury — snarling open mouth, burst energy
